mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_reservation (work_order_id, material_id, reserved_qty) VALUES (#{workOrderId}, #{materialId}, #{qty}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reserved_qty = reserved_qty + VALUES(reserved_qty), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mi.actual_quantity, mi.quantity)), 0) FROM material_inventory mi WHERE mi.material_id = #{materialId} AND (mi.is_discarded IS NULL OR mi.is_discarded = 0)
SELECT wom.material_id AS materialId, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty FROM work_order_material wom WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order w SET w.shortage_status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE w.order_id = #{workOrderId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN material_reservation r ON r.work_order_id = wom.work_order_id AND r.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = w.order_id AND COALESCE(r.reserved_qty,0) < wom.required_qty )

UPDATE material_reservation r JOIN ( SELECT o.work_order_id, i.material_id, SUM(i.quantity) AS used_qty FROM material_outbound_item i JOIN material_outbound o ON o.outbound_id = i.outbound_id WHERE i.outbound_id = #{_parameter} GROUP BY o.work_order_id, i.material_id ) u ON u.work_order_id = r.work_order_id AND u.material_id = r.material_id SET r.reserved_qty = GREATEST(r.reserved_qty - u.used_qty, 0), r.updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE r FROM material_reservation r JOIN material_outbound o ON o.work_order_id = r.work_order_id WHERE o.outbound_id = #{_parameter} AND r.reserved_qty = 0
mapper.select: SELECT due_date FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(COALESCE(si.lead_days, m.default_lead_days, #{defaultLeadDays})), #{defaultLeadDays}) FROM work_order_material wom JOIN material m ON m.material_id = wom.material_id LEFT JOIN supplier_item si ON si.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
